name: Sarvam Samvaad
description: Indian conversational AI platform by Sarvam AI with voice and text agents in 11 Indian languages, deployable via WhatsApp, phone calls, and web — a Dialogflow alternative

opengraph.title: Sarvam AI | Sovereign Indian AI Ecosystem for LLMs, Agents, and AI Assistants
opengraph.description: At Sarvam, we're on a mission to create a sovereign AI ecosystem for India that empowers governments, enterprises, and nonprofits to use GenAI solutions.
